Btrait 1.0.1
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Benthic density and trait databases in R-package Btrait

Reference

All functions

Groups

Benthic typological groups

Btrait-package Btrait

Benthic fauna and trait characteristics

Traits_nioz Traits_cefas Traits_Db Traits_irr Taxonomy

Benthic effect and response trait characteristics, and taxonomy.

map_key() map_legend() map_MWTL() map_NSBS()

Simple plotting function for trait or density data

get_density() get_proportion() add_absences()

Functions for working with station x taxon data.

get_Db_index() get_irr_index()

Functions for obtaining the bioturbation and bio-irrigation potential index.

get_trait_density()

Functions for combining (station, taxon, density) data with (taxon, trait) data into (station, trait) data.

wide2long() w2l_density() w2l_trait() long2wide() l2w_density() l2w_trait()

Functions for conversion from long to wide format and vice versa.

MWTL

The benthic fauna data from the Dutch part of the Northsea, including abiotic conditions.

NSBS

The ICES northsea benthic survey (NSBS) from 1986, including abiotic conditions.

standardize_trait() standardize_taxonomy()

standarization of taxonomic and trait datasets

get_summary()

get Summary for station x taxon data

get_trait() extend_trait() fuzzy2crisp() crisp2fuzzy()

Functions for working with trait and taxonomic data.

get_taxon_info() get_taxonomy() metadata()

get_taxon_info gets trait information for a taxon get_taxonomy gets taxonomic information for a taxon metadata gets the description of the content of a database.

Contents

Developed by Karline Soetaert.
